MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Cohen of Law Offices of Bruce Krell telephone number 415-861-4414 for Plaintiff.
Amy Kimmel of Crosby & Rowell LLP telephone number 510-267-0300 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PLAINTIFF PARTICIA SIEGEL, SANFORD SIEGEL'S Motion To Compel Defense Medical Report is moot. Sanctions are denied. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
